zh.Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文素可姆
zh.Upham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭哈普爾武法姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Gifford於大約1434年出生在英國哈普爾易欽時，他的父親John Gifford30歲，母親Alice Ugworthy36歲。他於1455年與Eleanor Parker在英國哈普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1463年在英國英格蘭哈普爾武法姆享年30歲。

zh-hans.Upham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdo: 英国英格兰哈普爾武法姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Gifford于大约1434年出生在英国哈普爾易欽时，他的父亲John Gifford30岁，母亲Alice Ugworthy36岁。他于1455年与Eleanor Parker在英国哈普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1463年在英国英格兰哈普爾武法姆享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Gifford was born about 1434, in Itchen, Hampshire, England, his father, John Gifford, was 30 and his mother, Alice Ugworthy, was 36. He married Eleanor Parker in 1455, in Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1463, in Upham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Gifford est né environ 1434, à Itchen, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, John Gifford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Ugworthy, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Parker en 1455, à Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1463, à Upham, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Gifford um 1434 in Itchen, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gifford 30 und seine Mutter Alice Ugworthy 36. Er hat 1455 in Hampshire, England Eleanor Parker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1463 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Upham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Gifford è nato il circa 1434 nel Itchen, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, John Gifford, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice Ugworthy, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Parker nel 1455, nel Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1463, nel Upham, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Giffordが約1434年にイギリスハンプシュアイアイトチェンで生まれた時，父John Giffordは30歳，母Alice Ugworthyは36歳であった。1455年にイギリスハンプシュアイアでEleanor Parkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1463年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウファムで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Gifford(이)가 대략 1434년 영국 함프실르 잇친에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gifford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Ugworthy(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1455년 영국 함프실르에서 Eleanor Parker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 업함에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Gifford nasceu aproximadamente 1434, em Itchen, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gifford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ugworthy, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Parker em 1455, em Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1463, em Upham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Gifford родился около 1434 г. в местности ичэн, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Gifford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ugworthy, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Parker в 1455 г. в местности хампшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1463 г. в местности уфам, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Gifford nació aproximadamente 1434, en Itchen, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gifford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Ugworthy, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Eleanor Parker en 1455, en Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1463, en Upham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
